title: B2 conformance vector (canonical, all areas)
description: One schema across every B2 area, per the step-4 protocol agreement (writer proposal event 4665fea7, reviewer CONCUR event c79b0591). Per-area vector files are arrays of these. Lives in docs/core during step 4; moves into the B2 suite package when it opens (path pending the legacy/ quarantine move).

area.description: area name as in the hardening doc

authorityTier.description: tier of the authority the expected verdict derives from; provisional = depends on a provisional decision

sources.description: doc path + section per citation, matching the rule's sources

decisionDeps.description: named decisions the expected verdict depends on, e.g. da-windows (#49)

params.description: consensus parameters this vector instantiates (e.g. K/W/C); placeholders flagged as launch-freeze

inputs.description: the pure-predicate inputs: event bytes / prior state / chain facts / witnessed evidence, per the kernel signature in the hardening doc

flipMarker.description: present iff authorityTier=provisional: { decision, flipsTo } — what this vector becomes if DK rules the other way

status.description: locked = survived the per-area review gate

attackFlagRef.description: worklist row this vector discharges, if any
